title: Secure Pouch
description: Adds a secure pouch that protects your most valuable items from being lost on death.
body:
Tired of losing your hard-earned valuables every time you lose a fight? Secure Pouch is a simple but essential mod, inspired by the container system in *Escape from Tarkov*, designed to reduce the frustration of death in high-stakes environments.

![Secure Pouch GUI Overview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28334411fcbf3a9c21d598ab0e5ff6bf2aabc7fa.png)
![Secure Pouch GUI Overview 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5806f1d2aa4c146f55d787074c98eebcf1a27f30.png)
![Secure Pouch GUI Overview 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/953845c07d59340e227113d760fcaf8a792b67c0.png)

# Secure Pouch - v1.0.0 Official Release!

### Key Features
*   **Pouch Expansion System:** You can now expand the number of slots in your pouch using a new item.
*   **New Item: 'Pouch Upgrade Kit':** Crafted from Diamonds, Leather, and a Netherite Ingot. Hold it and Right-click to use.
*   **Server-Side Configuration (`securepouch-server.toml`):** Server administrators can now configure the 'initial slots', 'maximum slots', and 'slots added per upgrade' for the pouch.
*   **Death-Proof Storage:** Store your most precious items in a special pouch. Everything inside is **100% safe** when you die.
*   **Easy Access:** A simple button is added directly to your player inventory screen. No extra hotkeys or commands to remember.
*   **Seamless Integration:** Designed to feel like a natural part of the game. The inventory management is intuitive and works just like a chest.
*   **Server-Side & Secure:** All pouch data is handled securely on the server, ensuring there's no way for other players to access your protected loot.

### How to Use
1.  Press 'E' to open your inventory.
2.  Click the new pouch button located next to your character.
3.  Move items between your main inventory and the secure pouch. It's that simple!



Perfect for PvP servers, hardcore survival worlds, or for any player who wants a little extra insurance against disaster.
